story: As a user, I want to log in using my email and password so that I can access my dashboard.
As a customer, I want to sign in securely to my account.
As an employee, I want to access the portal using my credentials.
As a new user, I want to create an account so that I can start using the system.
As a visitor, I want to sign up using my email address.
As a customer, I want to register for a new account.
As a customer, I want to search products by name so that I can find items quickly.
As a user, I want to filter products by category.
As a buyer, I want to search for available hotels.
As a buyer, I want to pay using my credit card so that I can complete the purchase.
As a customer, I want to make online payments securely.
As a user, I want to complete payment using a debit card.
As a user, I want to update my profile information.
As a customer, I want to change my profile picture.
As a user, I want to edit my account settings.
As a user, I forgot my password and want to reset it.
As a customer, I want to receive a password reset link.
As a user, I want to create a new password after verification.
As a user, I want to log out securely after using the system.
As a customer, I want to sign out from my account.
As a user, I want to end my current session.
As a user, I want to verify my email address after registration.
As a customer, I want to confirm my email using a verification code.
As a user, I want to activate my account through email verification.
As a customer, I want to add products to my shopping cart.
As a user, I want to remove items from my cart.
As a buyer, I want to update quantities in my cart.
As a customer, I want to place an order for selected items.
As a buyer, I want to track my order status.
As a customer, I want to cancel my order before shipping.
As a traveler, I want to book a hotel room online.
As a user, I want to reserve movie tickets.
As a customer, I want to schedule an appointment.
As a user, I want to upload my profile image.
As a customer, I want to attach supporting documents.
As an employee, I want to import files into the system.
As a user, I want to receive notifications about new updates.
As a customer, I want to receive email alerts for promotions.
As a user, I want to enable push notifications.
As an administrator, I want to manage user accounts.
As an admin, I want to view system analytics.
As an administrator, I want to control access permissions.
As a customer, I want to review my order before checkout.
As a user, I want to complete the checkout process quickly.
As a buyer, I want to proceed to checkout securely.
As a user, I want dark mode support.
As a customer, I want the app theme to be customizable.
As a user, I want voice assistant integration.
